subject: Re: ts_import selection criteria got nothing.
body:
Hi Alister,

Thank you so much for the quick response. I’ve tried both approaches you 
suggested, but I’m still running into the same issue. 
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1uySdQyIO3qzTjrV_IEiNItrQfWV4rd6r?usp=sharing  
contains my .eer and mdoc files for reference could you please take a look 
and let me know if I might be missing something?

Thanks again for your help!

Best regards,
Shanmukha
On Tuesday, June 3, 2025 at 5:08:15 PM UTC-7 alist...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi Shanmukha,
>
> two possibilities
> - your tilts got deactivated at some point in earlier processing, see 
> https://warpem.github.io/warp/reference/warptools/api/general/#change_selection for 
> how to fix
> - the filenames in your mdocs don't match the names of your eer files
>
> Good luck!
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
>
> On Tue, 3 Jun 2025 at 13:54, 'Shanmukha Vamshi Kuruba' via Warp <
> war...@googlegroups.com> wrote:
>
>> I'm trying to reconstruct a tomogram for tilt series from .eer files. 
>> When I run the following command, It doesn't generate a .tomostar file. I 
>> have checked the max tilt angle and  masker fraction and they are well 
>> within the limits. 
>>
>> Any Idea what could be causing the problem? I would appreciate any help.
>>

>> mdocs = frames/
>> pattern = *.mdoc
>> frameseries = warp_frameseries
>> tilt_exposure = 3.46
>> dont_invert = True
>> override_axis = null
>> auto_zero = False
>> tilt_offset = null

>> max_mask = 1
